mapper.insert: /* 장치 등록 */ insert into tb_device ( device_id, /* 장치ID */ site_id, /* 사이트ID */ user_idx, /* 사용자식별자 */ device_name, /* 장치명 */ device_grp_idx, /* 장치그룹식별자 */ device_type, /* 장치출처구분(1:PCS,2:BMS,3:PV,4:부하측정기기,5:PV모니터링기기,6:ESS모니터링기기,7:iSmart,8:총량기기,9:AMI,S:접속반,I:인버터,A:ACB,V:VCB) */ inst_type, /* 설치구분(1:에너톡,2:로컬EMS) */ del_yn, /* 삭제여부(Y:예,N:아니오) */ reg_uid, /* 등록자ID */ reg_date /* 등록일시 */ ) values ( #{deviceId }, #{siteId }, #{userIdx }, #{deviceName }, #{deviceGrpIdx }, #{deviceType }, #{instType }, 'N', #{regUid }, now() )
mapper.select:
/* 장치정보 조회 */ SELECT dv.* , dv_info.* FROM tb_device dv /* 장치출처구분(1:PCS,2:BMS,3:PV,4:부하측정기기,5:PV모니터링기기,6:ESS모니터링기기,7:iSmart,8:총량기기,9:AMI,S:접속반,I:인버터,A:ACB,V:VCB) */
INNER JOIN tb_device_inverter dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.inverter_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_pcs dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_bms dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_pv dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_pv dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_pv dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_pv dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_pv dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_pv dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
INNER JOIN tb_device_pv dv_info ON dv.site_id = dv_info.site_id AND dv.device_id = dv_info.device_id
WHERE 1=1 AND dv.site_id = #{siteId } AND dv.device_id = #{deviceId } AND dv.device_grp_idx = #{deviceGrpIdx } AND dv.device_type = #{deviceType }
